# Test performance and load for system server
timeout 60s bash << 'EOF'
go run . &
server_pid=$!
sleep 2

# Initialize
echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"tools":{}},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"1.0.0"}}}' | nc localhost 2000 || echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"tools":{}},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"1.0.0"}}}' > /dev/stdin
echo ""

# Test rapid consecutive calls
for i in {1..5}; do
    echo "== Rapid call $i =="
    echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":'$((i+1))',"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_system_info","arguments":{}}}' | nc localhost 2000 || echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":'$((i+1))',"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_system_info","arguments":{}}}' > /dev/stdin
    echo ""
done

# Test large process list request
echo "== Large process list =="
echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":7,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"list_processes","arguments":{"limit":100}}}' | nc localhost 2000 || echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":7,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"list_processes","arguments":{"limit":100}}}' > /dev/stdin
echo ""

# Test system info with environment variables (potentially large)
echo "== System info with env vars =="
echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":8,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_system_info","arguments":{"include_env":true}}}' | nc localhost 2000 || echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":8,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_system_info","arguments":{"include_env":true}}}' > /dev/stdin
echo ""

# Test all environment variables
echo "== All environment variables =="
echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":9,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_env_vars","arguments":{}}}' | nc localhost 2000 || echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":9,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_env_vars","arguments":{}}}' > /dev/stdin
echo ""

# Test multiple disk usage checks in sequence
for path in "." "/tmp" "/usr" "/var"; do
    echo "== Disk usage for $path =="
    echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":'$((10 + RANDOM % 100))',"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_disk_usage","arguments":{"path":"'$path'"}}}' | nc localhost 2000 || echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":'$((10 + RANDOM % 100))',"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_disk_usage","arguments":{"path":"'$path'"}}}' > /dev/stdin
    echo ""
done

# Test concurrent command execution (safe commands only)
echo "== Multiple concurrent echo commands =="
for i in {1..3}; do
    echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":'$((20+i))',"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"execute_command","arguments":{"command":"echo","args":["Concurrent test '$i'"],"timeout":10}}}' | nc localhost 2000 || echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":'$((20+i))',"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"execute_command","arguments":{"command":"echo","args":["Concurrent test '$i'"],"timeout":10}}}' > /dev/stdin &
done
wait
echo ""

# Test command with moderate output
echo "== Command with moderate output =="
echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":24,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"execute_command","arguments":{"command":"ls","args":["-la","/usr/bin"],"timeout":15}}}' | nc localhost 2000 || echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":24,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"execute_command","arguments":{"command":"ls","args":["-la","/usr/bin"],"timeout":15}}}' > /dev/stdin
echo ""

# Cleanup
kill $server_pid 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 1
EOF
